question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/errors/errors.go -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: newError()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the fact that ErrTransactionFreezeFailed (code 123, retriable=false) is non-retriable, causing clients to abandon transaction construction during a partition-induced freeze failure, resulting in permanent transaction loss when the underlying condition is actually transient and would resolve after partition healing?
